title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Astral Pipes - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
